title: rhododendron ciliicalyx subsp. lyi
intro: Rhododendron ciliicalyx subsp. lyi is a subspecies of flowering plant in the heath family, native to China and characterized by its showy flowers and broad leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron ciliicalyx subsp. lyi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various diseases. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron ciliicalyx subsp. lyi include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
